title: Acquisition System Build
description: A practical acquisition system across paid, SEO, outbound, content, CRO, and reporting, built around how your buyers actually decide.
audience: Best for teams that have tried channels in isolation and now need an acquisition motion that compounds.
promise: You get channel map, campaign briefs, and reporting dashboard — artefacts the team executes, not a presentation.
outcomes: Channel strategy tied to ICP, buying trigger, stage, and margins
Landing pages and offers built around buyer intent
Paid, SEO, outbound, content, and CRO experiments prioritised by likely return
Measurement that connects campaigns to pipeline, not vanity metrics
process: Map the buying journey across 20 recent won/lost deals, current channel evidence, and conversion gaps
Choose the acquisition motion that fits stage, team capacity, and LTV/CAC ratio
Build 3 campaign briefs with audience, offer, landing page wireframe, and tracking spec
Launch, measure CPL and MQL rate weekly, scale only channels showing >2x ROAS
